experiment_3.Task: Predict a survival-related outcome from multimodal pathology data in Galaxy using image and tabular inputs.
experiment_3.Prompt: I have an image archive plus separate training and test tables from a pathology study, and I want a Galaxy analysis that predicts the study's survival-related outcome label from the multimodal data. Please choose a suitable Galaxy approach, evaluate it on the held-out test split, and tell me the target column you used and the test ROC-AUC.
